fields.title: [spec-api] Add structured tracing for SpecStore runtime operations
[spec-api] Add structured tracing for SpecStore runtime operations
[spec-api] Add structured tracing for SpecStore runtime operations
fields.validation_summary: Added structured tracing to SpecStore open/init/open_or_init/scan/slug-index/resolve_id flows. Focused validation passed for open_or_init_bootstraps_manifest_only_local_store and scan_updates_indexed_path_after_spec_folder_moves_between_roots, followed by full cargo test -p spec-api (65 passed).
